summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrashPeças automotive parts website. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend mostly working with minor dropdown interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown option selection has visibility issues during automated testing

passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and featured products
Navigation works for all pages (Início, Loja, Solicitar Peça, Sobre Nós, Contactos)
Catalog page with search and category/condition filters
Contact form submission with WhatsApp integration
WhatsApp floating button present on all pages
WhatsApp URL generation for all forms
Google Maps integration on contact page
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed for dropdown selection in Request Part form - consider improving element visibility or using different selection approach for better user experience
